lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Hello, I'm Horace. Welcome to my shop. Would you like to buy or sell something?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Hello my friend, my name is Horace! You're in the city of Hosidius. Most everyone round here tends the farms. Without us, Kourend would have no crops at all.

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: So, do you need to buy or sell something today?
